title: viola × joannis-wagneri
intro: Viola × joannis-wagneri, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Viola tricolor and Viola odorata, is a type of flowering plant in the viola family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Viola × joannis-wagneri are believed to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, and may also have a positive effect on the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote overall health and well-being.
